scaled_oracle_cases.description: Test get_version_message() when NetworkX is unavailable to verify graceful handling of missing dependency.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Handle missing NetworkX module gracefully by reporting version as 'unknown'.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: If macsypy.solution.nx is None, the function must output '- NetworkX unknown' without raising an error.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Original solution would raise AttributeError or produce empty string for NetworkX version.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
import sys, types, pandas as pd, networkx as nx
macsypy = types.SimpleNamespace(__version__='1.2.3', solution=types.SimpleNamespace(nx=None), __citation__='Doe et al., 2023')
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the new computation and contract constraints introduced by this operator.

stdout_contains: If you use this software please cite
